claim_discipline: Derived corruption pools are deterministically generated from public originals and tagged per record; they are NOT claimed to be unmodified raw data. HF-hub raw shards are publicly re-downloadable at the pinned revisions; their bytes are NOT locally backed up on a second machine and are NOT claimed as a dual-end byte backup. Runtime-absent hashes are NOT_CAPTURED, never invented.

per_arm_corruption_pools.reason: the four arm runners generate the corruption pool deterministically in-process (inject_noise with np.random.default_rng(seed+7), NOISE_FRAC from env) and never persist it to disk; the exact bytes are reproducible from raw source + split-id manifest + recipe, and the pairing arrays_sha256 of the generated pool matches the pubcore batch exactly (see split_manifest_verification)

recipes.vision: inject_noise(pool_labels, seed): rng=default_rng(seed+7); NOISE_FRAC=0.4; kinds flip/near-dup/hard, tagged; dup embeddings overwritten in-runner
recipes.timeseries: inject_noise(X, Y, seed): rng=default_rng(seed+7); NOISE_FRAC=0.4; kinds corrupt/flat/shuffle/dup (quarter each), tagged
recipes.tep: inject_noise(X, labels, seed, n_classes): rng=default_rng(seed+7); NOISE_FRAC=0.4; kinds flip/corrupt/dup (third each), tagged
recipes.tabular: inject_noise(X, labels, seed, n_classes): rng=default_rng(seed+7); NOISE_FRAC=0.4; kinds flip/corrupt/dup, tagged

hf_cache_policy.note: HF hub cache artifacts are publicly re-downloadable at the pinned revisions recorded above; bytes are not locally backed up on a second machine and this inventory does NOT claim a dual-end byte backup for them.

tabular_seed0.basis: export run recomputed the full pool/validation/test arrays from the same seeded recipe in-process and its pairing arrays_sha256 matches the pubcore batch exactly

text_lane.reason: QZ4 text-lane runs emitted no split-id manifest at runtime; per the no-fabrication rule these ids are not re-derived after the fact

runner_code_provenance.export_env: METHODS=random SELECT_ONLY=1 PAIRED_RNG=1 CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES='' VAL_NOISE=0, arm configs identical to pubcore lanes
